# uiDelegate

**Instance Property**

The receiver’s user interface delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor unowned(unsafe) var uiDelegate: (any WebUIDelegate)! { get set }
```

## Discussion

A user interface delegate that conforms to the WebUIDelegate protocol.

## Getting and Setting Delegates

- **downloadDelegate**: The receiver’s download delegate.
- **frameLoadDelegate**: The receiver’s frame load delegate.
- **policyDelegate**: The receiver’s policy delegate.
- **resourceLoadDelegate**: The receiver’s resource load delegate.
title: uiDelegate
